---
title: "Welcome to Afreen's Portfolio"
author: "Afreen Alam"
date: "05-21-2026"
---

## About Me

I am a data professional currently pursuing my Master of Science in Applied Business Analytics at Boston University. I bring over three years of industry experience across financial services, healthcare, and digital analytics. My expertise spans building scalable Generative AI/RAG systems, deploying predictive machine learning architectures, and engineering end-to-end data pipelines that drive strategic business decisions.

---

## Technical Skills

*   **LLM & Generative AI:** LangChain, Hugging Face Transformers, Reranker, OpenAI API, GitHub Models API, FAISS, RAGAS
*   **Machine Learning Frameworks:** PyTorch, Scikit-learn, XGBoost
*   **Programming Languages:** Python, SQL, R
*   **Visualization Tools:** Tableau, Power BI, Plotly, Matplotlib, Google Analytics

---

## Education

| Degree | Institution | Timeline |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **M.S. Applied Business Analytics** | Boston University | Expected Dec 2026 |
| **B.Sc. (Honours) Data Science and Analytics** | National University of Singapore | May 2022 |

---
